title: Korok Origin
description: A small impact 2 origin based off the korok from legend of zelda (breath of the wild korok)
body:
🌳 Korok

Impact: 🟢 🟢 

A small and mischievous forest spirit that loves hiding

Leafy Copter :
By spinning thick leaves in your offhand you can propel your self into the air (uses oak leaves)

Natural Instincts :
Living in forests all your life has given you strong knowledge of trees and natural elements allowing you to traverse trees with ease

Special Maracas :
By harvesting the energy from beetroot seeds you are able to expand your inventory (hold seeds in mainhand and then use primary key)

Unfamiliar Organism :
Koroks are rare creatures and little is known about them the only known facts are that they are small and weak to physical attacks

Leafy Transportation :
Using natural power you can move yourself up to 50 blocks using the secondary keybind

Hardened Body :
As a child of the forest your body has hardened giving you a strong immunity against poison and wither


*requires pehkui

Forgot this existed for a bit may rework at some point later. I love tus (cactus).
